description: This stylish sling bag from murcia is designed for the fashion conscious. Wear it on your shoulder and turn heads wherever you go! Height: 27 cm Width: 38 cm Depth: 10 cm Leatherette upper for durability One main compartment with a zippered pocket Two short handles with buckle design Zippered pocket on the back Copper badge on the front Stitched detailing on the front Bag care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
